_metadata.for_match: Houston Dynamo FC vs El Paso Locomotive FC
_metadata.competition: 2026 Lamar Hunt U.S. Open Cup — Round of 32
_metadata.notes: Updated April 12: Colorado 6-2 loss (April 11) added as bounce-back content angle. Sviatchenko suspension SERVED (Seattle April 4) — updated to AVAILABLE. Markanich 2-match ban SERVED — updated to AVAILABLE. Hot posts from April 3 PC scan still current. Injury status for Artur/Halter needs April 15 morning check (per Charles's Perplexity scan plan).

matchday_hook: After a rough Saturday in Colorado (we don't need to talk about it), the Dynamo have one week to flip the script — and what better way than Wednesday night Open Cup energy at Shell Energy? 🏆 El Paso Locomotive rolls in, a USL squad that just demolished New Mexico United 4-0 and they are NOT here to be tourists. But this is a new competition, a clean slate, and Houston is a TWO-TIME Open Cup champion. Guilherme is still the main character (4G/3A, Neymar in his DMs), Bogusz baby girl has arrived 👶, and Sviatchenko is back from suspension with something to prove. Ben Olsen — the man who won this cup as a PLAYER and as a COACH — knows exactly what it takes. Time to defend the legacy.
vibe_strip_items: 🚂 El Paso Locomotive FC — Open Cup Round of 32, Wednesday night vibes
😬 Colorado was rough (6-2). Open Cup is a new competition. Bounce back starts NOW.
🏆 Two-time Open Cup champs (2018, 2023) — Ben Olsen won this as player AND coach
👶 BOGUSZ BABY GIRL HAS ARRIVED — first-time dad in the building
🔥 Guilherme: 4G/3A, Neymar in his DMs — the main character is locked in
💪 Sviatchenko BACK — suspension served, redemption arc is live
🎯 El Paso: beat New Mexico United 4-0 in Open Cup R2 — do not sleep on them
🇸🇻 Amando Moreno (El Paso) — El Salvador international, 50+ USL goals, watch him
1️⃣.1️⃣M Héctor Herrera still the biggest IG in the building
🍼 Artur comeback watch: mid-April return — April 15 is in range

hot_posts.description: Isybella competed on Beast Games Season 2 and has been posting about a fertility journey
hot_posts.why_its_hot: MrBeast connection + personal vulnerability content. She's also a former elite triple jumper. The toddler Bond calls the Dynamo kit 'Daddy footy.'
hot_posts.suggested_tea: The goalkeeper's wife was on BEAST GAMES. As in the MrBeast show. On Amazon. We need to talk about this.

hot_posts.description: 8th wedding anniversary post — '19 years as sweethearts and today we celebrate 8 years of marriage ❤️ Forever us ❤️'
hot_posts.caption_excerpt: 19 år som kærester og idag kan vi fejre 8 års bryllupsdag ❤️ Forevigt os ❤️
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The man who lived an entire telenovela vs Dallas (goal + own goal + red card) posted the most romantic anniversary tribute. The duality of Erik Sviatchenko. He sat out the Seattle game (suspension served) and now he's BACK — and ready to remind everyone why he's the captain.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: Romance on the timeline, chaos on the pitch, and now he's back. The captain served his suspension, posted a 19-year anniversary tribute, and returns for Open Cup. The Sviatchenko redemption arc is officially in progress.

hot_posts.description: Birthday tribute to husband Agustín Bouzat on his 32nd birthday.
hot_posts.caption_excerpt: Birthday tribute to Chiqui Bouzat — 32 years young
hot_posts.why_its_hot: Fiorella is a Physical Education teacher, mom to 2-year-old Salvador, and posted the sweetest tribute. Argentine couple goals in Houston.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: The Bouzat-Curutchet family is settling into Houston beautifully. Salvador turned 2 in January, Bouzat turned 32 on March 28. Family vibes are immaculate.

hot_posts.description: 'Marzo 2026' monthly recap post — lifestyle content with 1.1M followers watching.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The squad's biggest IG presence (1.1M followers) posting monthly lifestyle recaps. Single king era continues. The prodigal son returned to Houston and he's thriving.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 1.1M followers, freshly divorced, posting monthly recaps like he's running a magazine. Héctor Herrera is living his best single-in-Houston life.

hot_posts.description: Last own post was Jan 21. Baby girl was due in February. Tagged in Bogusz's Mar 15 post from Houston. Radio silence since.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: BABY WATCH IS AT DEFCON 1. Wiktoria's last post showed her pregnant belly with '02.2026 💝'. She was due in February. She was spotted in Bogusz's March 15 post in Houston. The baby has almost certainly arrived but they're keeping it private.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: The Pilates instructor with 24K followers went quiet right when the baby was due. New mom hibernation mode is ON. We're just waiting for the reveal.

hot_posts.description: Daughter's 1st birthday celebration — '1 ano da nossa pequenina!' (1 year of our little one!)
hot_posts.why_its_hot: Sweet daddy content. Artur celebrated his daughter's first birthday with the most heartfelt post. He's injured right now but the family content is A+.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: The Brazilian midfielder may be sidelined with an injury, but he's winning at dad life. His daughter just turned 1 and the celebration post was pure joy.

hot_posts.description: Match celebration post with religious caption — 'Amado is happy Gloria a Deus ❤️‍'
hot_posts.caption_excerpt: Amado is happy Gloria a Deus ❤️‍
hot_posts.why_its_hot: 439K followers watching the breakout star of the season. 4 goals, 3 assists in 4 matches. Neymar literally texted him. No confirmed partner — the man is all about football and God right now.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: When Neymar is sliding into your DMs to say 'you learned that from me,' you've made it. Guilherme is the main character of the 2026 season and the vibes are spiritual.

hot_posts.description: Houston lost 6-2 to Colorado Rapids at home on April 11. Four days later they host El Paso Locomotive in the US Open Cup Round of 32.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The bounce-back narrative writes itself. One of their worst results of the season (6-2 at home) and four days later they're hosting an Open Cup match with their two-championship legacy on the line. Ben Olsen won this cup as a player (DC United 2008) and as a coach (2013, 2023). He knows how to use a bad week as fuel.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: Four days after a 6-2 loss, the two-time Open Cup champions host a USL team at Shell Energy. The math is simple: this is how you answer a bad week. Guilherme, Sviatchenko, and the rest have a very clear statement to make on Wednesday night.

hot_posts.description: 29th birthday celebrated by the team and on his personal feed.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The #10 just turned 29 and has 8 goals on the season. Designated Player money well spent. His wife Martina is on a social media break since July 2024.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 8 goals at 29 — Ponce is in his prime. Birthday boy energy for the Seattle match.

injury_flags.detail: 1-match suspension SERVED vs Seattle Sounders (April 4). Captain returns for Open Cup.
injury_flags.impact: Redemption arc content angle — back and ready to lead the backline.

injury_flags.detail: 2-match ban (serious foul play vs Portland) fully served. Available for selection.
injury_flags.impact: Forward option returns to the squad.

injury_flags.detail: Lower body injury (knee per BeSoccer). Mid-April return — April 15 is right in that window. Verify April 15 AM with Charles's Perplexity scan.
injury_flags.impact: Key midfield presence. If he returns, huge boost. If not, depth continues to cover.

injury_flags.detail: Lower body injury. Mid-April return expected — tight timeline for April 15. Verify April 15 AM.
injury_flags.impact: Defensive depth compromised. Fiancée Madison Tayler providing moral support from the stands.

injury_flags.detail: Houston lost 6-2 to Colorado Rapids on April 11 (MLS). New injuries or rotation changes possible. Verify lineup news before April 14 assembly. Bounce-back narrative is a legit content angle for Open Cup guide.
injury_flags.impact: Check Bayou City Soccer and MLS injury reports for any April 11 casualties before pipeline run.

roster_changes.detail: Not on official roster as of April 3, 2026 verification.
9 jersey number changes verified: Antônio Carlos (25→3), Franco Negri (3→21), Reese Miller (34→27), Bouzat (22→30), Arana (17→22), Markanich (7→17), Ibrahim (27→24), Vines (TBD→13), Resch (TBD→34).

opponent_scouting.competition: 2026 Lamar Hunt U.S. Open Cup — Round of 32
opponent_scouting.form_summary: 2-0-1 in USL Championship, 7 points, 3rd in Western Conference. Beat New Mexico United 4-0 in Open Cup Round 2. Hot form coming in.
opponent_scouting.rotation_risk: LOW — This is El Paso's biggest game of the season. No Champions Cup commitments. Expect their full strength XI.
opponent_scouting.narrative: El Paso is coming to Houston with something to prove. USL underdogs in an Open Cup upset bid — the Locomotive are dangerous, organized, and in form. Don't sleep on them.

players_to_watch.name: Amando Moreno
fun_facts: Born in the US, plays for El Salvador national team (Salvadoran passport 2021)
Hit 50 USL Championship regular season goals milestone this season
10 goals + 4 assists in USL play last season — team's leading scorer
Called up to El Salvador's 2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup squad
34K Instagram followers — one of El Paso's most visible players
players_to_watch.one_liner: The milestone man. 50 USL goals and counting, El Salvador international, and the face of El Paso's attack. He's the one Houston's defense needs to know about.

players_to_watch.name: Gabi Torres
fun_facts: Set El Paso's all-time club assist record in 2025 — 11 assists across all competitions
Brazilian versatility: plays midfielder AND winger interchangeably
His left-side combination with Moreno is El Paso's most dangerous weapon
Former Phoenix Rising FC, came to El Paso via trade in January 2025
University of the District of Columbia alum — 34 goals, 21 assists in college
players_to_watch.one_liner: The record-setter. Gabi Torres broke El Paso's assist record in his first season there — the Brazilian creative engine who makes Moreno dangerous.

players_to_watch.name: Robert Coronado
fun_facts: From La Habra, California — a local kid making it in the lower divisions
Joined El Paso mid-2024 from USL League One side Central Valley Fuego FC
The engine in El Paso's midfield — the box-to-box presence that makes everything work
players_to_watch.one_liner: The midfield heartbeat. Coronado keeps El Paso organized — the kind of player you don't notice until he's not there.

beat_writer_sources.author: Rudy Segura
beat_writer_sources.title: Three Players to Watch: Seattle Sounders
beat_writer_sources.key_takeaway: Andrew Thomas (GK replacing Frei), Paul Rothrock (always dangerous vs Houston), Albert Rusnák (creative engine). Seattle may rotate due to midweek Champions Cup.

beat_writer_sources.title: Player Availability Report
beat_writer_sources.key_takeaway: Houston: Artur (lower body), Halter (lower body) OUT. Seattle: Arriola (knee), Ragen (hamstring) OUT.

beat_writer_sources.title: Artur Injury Report
beat_writer_sources.key_takeaway: Artur's injury is a knee issue — mid-April return expected. Halter also mid-April.
